title: Xeris Shattered Syrian Fish Bowl
description: Shattering combination of seared fish, crispy vegetables, and a tangy yogurt sauce. Prepare the components in advance for a stress-free meal prep.

ingredients.name: Yogurt (full-fat)
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality brand for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Cucumber
ingredients.notes: Peel and thinly slice for maximum flavor

ingredients.name: Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Halve and seed for a tangy bite

ingredients.name: Red onion
ingredients.notes: Thinly slice for a pungent flavor

ingredients.name: Cooking wine
ingredients.notes: Dry white wine for the best flavor

instructions: Season the cod fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the cod fillets for 2 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, combine the yogurt, lemon juice, garlic, and a pinch of salt and pepper in a bowl.
Thinly slice the cucumber and tomatoes.
Thinly slice the red onion and separate into individual rings.
Combine the sliced cucumber, tomatoes, and red onion in a bowl.
Shock the cooked cod fillets in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Chop the parsley and sprinkle over the top of the yogurt sauce.
Serve the cod fillets in a bed of the yogurt sauce and topped with the sautéed vegetables.
